title: Shri Vishnu Bhagwan Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Vishnu Bhagwan Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Lord Vishnu.
description:
Om Jai Jagdish Hare,
Swami Jai Jagdish Hare.
Bhakt janon ke sankat,
Das janon ke sankat,
Kshan mein door kare॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Jo dhyave phal paave,
Dukh binse man ka.
Swami dukh binse man ka.
Sukh sampati ghar aave,
Kasht mite tan ka॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Maat-pita tum mere,
Sharan gahun kiski.
Swami sharan gahun main kiski.
Tum bin aur na dooja,
Aas karun main kiski॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tum pooran parmatma,
Tum antaryami.
Swami tum antaryami.
Parbrahm parmeshwar,
Tum sabke swami॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tum karuna ke sagar,
Tum palankarta.
Swami tum palankarta.
Main moorakh falkami,
Main sevak tum swami,
Kripa karo bharta॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tum ho ek agochar,
Sabke pranpati.
Swami sabke pranpati.
Kis vidhi miloon dayamay,
Tumko main kumati॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Deenbandhu dukhaharta,
Thakur tum mere.
Swami thakur tum mere.
Apne haath uthao,
Dwar pada main tere॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Vishay vikar mitao,
Paap haro deva.
Swami paap haro deva.
Shraddha bhakti badhao,
Santan ki seva॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

Tan-man-dhan aur sampati,
Sab kuch hai tera.
Swami sab kuch hai tera.
Tera tujhko arpan,
Kya laage mera॥
॥ Om Jai Jagdish Hare ॥

faq.q1: What is the significance of performing Lord Vishnu's Aarti?
faq.a1: Lord Vishnu is the preserver of the universe. Performing his Aarti brings happiness, peace, prosperity, and protection into life. It helps remove ego from the devotee's mind and guides them towards spiritual liberation (Moksha).
faq.q2: Which day is most auspicious for worshipping Lord Vishnu?
faq.a2: Thursday (Brihaspativar) is considered the most auspicious day for worshipping Lord Vishnu. Reciting the Vishnu Sahasranama and performing Aarti on this day is highly fruitful.
faq.q3: What items should be used during the Aarti?
faq.a3: Lord Vishnu is fond of the color yellow. For Aarti, one should use yellow flowers, yellow clothes, sandalwood, a ghee lamp, and most importantly, Tulsi leaves (basil).
faq.q4: Can Vishnu Aarti be performed at home?
faq.a4: Yes, you can perform the Aarti with full devotion at home in front of an idol or picture of Lord Vishnu or any of his avatars (like Krishna or Ram).
faq.q5: What should be recited at the end of the Vishnu Aarti?
faq.a5: After singing the Aarti, it is considered auspicious to conclude by chanting 'Karpur Gauram' or 'Mantrahinam Kriyahinam' to seek forgiveness for any errors committed during the worship.
